name: The Four Beautiful Wives | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Time has passed. You've all grown up! And you are now married to each Doki! And it's so wholesome...

"The sound of the 9 went BANG. And all over the wall was his mothafucken brain." - N.W.A (Appetite For Destruction)

Guess who's back?! That's right! 🙏🏻💙 Cooked up a really cute and wholesome scenario here. So onto the notes.

  • Fluff Prioritized! — You know it, only Fluff 'round these parts. No horror, no Angst and no Smut. (Although, you'll find a way anyway. And that's ok.)

  • Wives! — All the Doki's are your lovely wives. They all love you, and care for you. Monika however in this scenario has chilled the hell out. She might show small signs of jealousy here and there. But for the most part. She is usually pretty chill. So expect some wholesome stuff! 🙏🏻💙(Less drama then usual.)

  • ANYPOV! — Yes! It's ANYPOV! So, no matter what. These four ladies will love you. Regardless of who you are. I made sure.

And thats really about it! 🙏🏻💙

Lemme know if you enjoy! Leave me a review. This was requested a couple of times, it was something I was going to do for awhile. So, I want ahead and finished making it! — Love y'all fr.

My Discord: HERE!

For ALL those people who wanted to love up on all of them. Without hurting anyone's feelings or feeling bad for picking one over the other. This is the Bot to do it in fr. 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
